description: A farmer has received an invoice from a chemical supplier that does not match their own records.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the farm's corresponding purchase order and delivery receipts.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the farm's internal records for the transaction.

nodes.task_description: Compare the documents and identify the discrepancy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the invoice incorrectly charged for 100 gallons, while the delivery receipt shows only 90 gallons were delivered.

nodes.task_description: Draft an email to the supplier outlining the discrepancy and requesting a corrected invoice.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a professional email with all the relevant details and attachments.
